title: Prevent users to use Copilot Edge
author: Penguin
text:
I want to prevent users from using Copilot Edge to create a summary of my displayed website. Is there any way to do this? Robots.txt?
I don't want to switch of Copilot Edge completely - just on my website.

I don't want to switch of Copilot Edge completely - just on my website.
